fixItPostsCreated.body: Within message board, you can't tell what message you have read and what message are unread.

Within the main dashboard, there is some navigation language and workflow logic that is causing confusion.

The objective task categories currently displayed on the main dashboard are:

Open
Overdue
Due Today
Due Within 7 Days
Due Within 14 Days
Due Within 28 Days
Completed

These are good and should be considered the core visuals for team productivity.

However, when a user clicks into Open, for example, the next screen only shows the following status options:

All
On Track
At Risk
Blocked
Not Started
Completed

These should be treated as sub-filters under the main dashboard categories, not separate navigation areas.

For example, on the main dashboard, Open should show a breakdown of how many open objectives are:

On Track
At Risk
Blocked
Not Started

Then, when a user clicks Open, it should only take them to the open objectives. From there, the user should be able to apply additional filters without needing to navigate back to the home screen to view another category such as Due Within 7 Days.

Would it work better to have one Objective List view with filter selections instead of forcing users to navigate through multiple areas of the platform?

The suggested filter structure would be:

First filter: Ownership / Scope
My Objectives
Individual Person
Group / Department
All Objectives

Second filter: Main Category
All
Open
Overdue
Due Today
Due Within 7 Days
Due Within 14 Days
Due Within 28 Days
Completed

Third filter: Status
All
On Track
At Risk
Blocked
Not Started
Completed

The goal is to make the objective view more inclusive and flexible so users can quickly see what they need without moving through multiple screens. For example, a user should be able to select:

My Objectives + Open + At Risk
Operations Group + Due Within 7 Days + Blocked
All Objectives + Overdue + Not Started

This would create one centralized view where the user can filter by ownership, due-date category, and status. It should reduce confusion, improve visibility, and make it easier for teams and managers to identify what needs attention.
Make org chart editable via tree function and enable export of org chart to PDF document. Ensure org chart visual is scaled properly to fit the PDF output document of the org chart tree.
Main Dashboard needs a completed Tap.

Enable configuration of dashboard view. I only want to see the main title subjected. User should be able to select if they want to just see the subject. Or if they also want to see preview of the details.
CSV objective export is convoluted with having Objective ID included in the report. Remove Objective ID. Also Make sure that the Top line section is filterable.

fixItAll.body: Within message board, you can't tell what message you have read and what message are unread.

Within the main dashboard, there is some navigation language and workflow logic that is causing confusion. The objective task categories currently displayed on the main dashboard are: Open Overdue Due Today Due Within 7 Days Due Within 14 Days Due Within 28 Days Completed These are good and should be considered the core visuals for team productivity. However, when a user clicks into Open, for example, the next screen only shows the following status options: All On Track At Risk Blocked Not Started Completed These should be treated as sub-filters under the main dashboard categories, not separate navigation areas. For example, on the main dashboard, Open should show a breakdown of how many open objectives are: On Track At Risk Blocked Not Started Then, when a user clicks Open, it should only take them to the open objectives. From there, the user should be able to apply additional filters without needing to navigate back to the home screen to view another category such as Due Within 7 Days. Would it work better to have one Objective List view with filter selections instead of forcing users to navigate through multiple areas of the platform? The suggested filter structure would be: First filter: Ownership / Scope My Objectives Individual Person Group / Department All Objectives Second filter: Main Category All Open Overdue Due Today Due Within 7 Days Due Within 14 Days Due Within 28 Days Completed Third filter: Status All On Track At Risk Blocked Not Started Completed The goal is to make the objective view more inclusive and flexible so users can quickly see what they need without moving through multiple screens. For example, a user should be able to select: My Objectives + Open + At Risk Operations Group + Due Within 7 Days + Blocked All Objectives + Overdue + Not Started This would create one centralized view where the user can filter by ownership, due-date category, and status. It should reduce confusion, improve visibility, and make it easier for teams and managers to identify what needs attention.
